name: Maine PFR Professional Licensee Search

agency.name: Maine Department of Professional and Financial Regulation

updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official licensee search before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Maine professional and occupational license records exposed by PFR/OPOR licensee search, including construction-relevant boards where available
knownExclusions: Maine does not have a single statewide general-contractor source represented by this entry.
This broad licensee search spans many boards and professions; construction-relevant records require source-specific filtering.
Local permits, municipal contractor rules, business registrations, and non-PFR authorizations are outside this source entry.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Future work should prefer official downloadable or API options if confirmed.
publicRecordsNotes: Official PFR lookup metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a trade license, local authorization, or business registration does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official construction-specific bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Maine PFR/OPOR licensee search. Future work should decide whether electricians, plumbers, fuel board, and other construction-relevant boards need separate source entries.
maintainerNotes: Do not imply Maine general-contractor coverage from this broad professional-license source.
